chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1331 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 19-12-2022 Mr. Ghulamullah Chang advocate for applicant along with applicant present on interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi A.P.G. Sindh. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J: - Applicant has been alleged to have issued threats to complainant, who is an advocate when he stopped him from making recording within the premises of Court at Tando Muhammad Khan. 2. Learned defense counsel has argued that applicant is innocent, has been falsely implicated in this case. There is no evidence of issuing any threat, that applicant is a Primary School Teacher and is not a Journalist and has been falsely implicated in this case. On the other hand, learned A.P.G. Sindh has opposed bail to the applicant. 3. I have gone through the record. The applicant has been alleged issuing threats to the complainant who is himself an advocate of dire consequences within Court premises. He was not armed with any weapon, therefore, applicability of section 506 PPC requires further inquiry. The remaining sections are bailable. In view of above, mala fide on the part of complainant cannot be ruled out. 4. Accordingly, in view of above, this application is allowed and interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. 5. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
